game_name: Bubsy in: Claws Encounters of the Furred Kind

distinctive_elements: Bubsy voice clips (pitched up recording of Brian Silva, inspired by Looney Tunes characters like Daffy Duck and Bugs Bunny)

notes: Wikipedia source contains no documented information about specific music tempos, keys, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics per area. Only composer name (Matt Berardo) and voice acting reference (Brian Silva) are documented. T3 tier data lacks technical audio specifications.
